name: rlog
title: rlog
description: A frictionless, public reading log manager for static blogs.
author: ossa-ma

commands.name: log-read
commands.title: Log Read
commands.subtitle: rlog
commands.description: Add a new article/post/blog/page to your read list

commands.name: capture
commands.title: Capture Read
commands.subtitle: rlog
commands.description: Capture a reading entry to a local file (no git, no blog setup)

preferences.name: inboxPath
preferences.title: Inbox File Path
preferences.description: Local JSONL file captures are appended to.

commands.name: sync
commands.title: Sync Reading Log
commands.subtitle: rlog
commands.description: Merge a captured inbox file into reading.json and push

preferences.name: inboxPath
preferences.title: Inbox File Path
preferences.description: Fallback inbox file when no Finder item is selected.

preferences.name: autoPush
preferences.title: Auto Push
preferences.label: Commit and push to the blog repo after syncing
preferences.description: When enabled, sync commits and pushes reading.json to your blog repo.

commands.name: setup-rlog
commands.title: Setup rlog
commands.subtitle: rlog
commands.description: Inject read and reading list code into your blog

commands.name: read-later
commands.title: Read Later
commands.subtitle: rlog
commands.description: Save current tab to reading list

commands.name: log-window
commands.title: Log Window
commands.subtitle: rlog
commands.description: Log all open tabs in the active window

commands.name: read-window-later
commands.title: Read Window Later
commands.subtitle: rlog
commands.description: Save all open tabs in the active window to read later

commands.name: open-random-article
commands.title: Open Random Article
commands.subtitle: rlog
commands.description: Open a random article from your reading list

preferences.name: blogPath
preferences.title: Blog Repository Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to your static blog repository. Not needed for the Capture Read command.

preferences.name: dataPath
preferences.title: Data File Path
preferences.description: Relative path to your reading.json file (default: data/reading.json).
